pr_helper.title: fix: update import statements to use correct React Core module
pr_helper.summary: This PR updates the import statements in the React Core module to ensure compatibility and correctness. It also adds checks to prevent satirical or humorous import statements. The changes are based on an investigation of the React Core documentation and the issue description.
pr_helper.problem_statement: The issue is related to incorrect import statements in the React Core module, which may cause compatibility issues or errors. The issue may also be related to satirical or humorous intent, which needs to be handled correctly.
pr_helper.solution_description: The solution involves updating the import statements to use the correct React Core module and adding checks to prevent satirical or humorous import statements. The changes are implemented in the compiler and fixtures folders, and tests are added to ensure the correctness of the import statements.
changes: Added checks to prevent satirical or humorous import statements
tests: Test that the import statement is being used correctly
Test that the React Core version is compatible with the project
Test that satirical or humorous import statements are handled correctly
pr_helper.notes_for_reviewer: Please review the changes in the compiler and fixtures folders, and ensure that the tests are correct and comprehensive.
